header.subtitle: News Dashboard
header.toggle_title: Logo or text — click to switch
header.color_theme_title: Accent color for links, buttons, and header
header.youtube_modal_hint: The AI suggests search directions. Each link opens YouTube search results — no YouTube Data API key required. Cache TTL matches “Summary cache (days)”.
header.youtube_regenerate_title: Discard cached suggestions and run the AI again

dashboard_settings.section_sources_hint: Choose which sites appear in the header. Search filters by name and URL (useful with many sources). At least one source must stay enabled.
dashboard_settings.toggle_visible_enable: Enable visible — check all sources currently shown (⊕)
dashboard_settings.toggle_visible_disable: Disable visible — uncheck all sources currently shown (⊖)
dashboard_settings.need_one: At least one news source must be enabled.
dashboard_settings.heise_magazines_heading: Extra heise.de sections (still one “heise.de” source in the header)

comments.unavailable_file: Comment stats: open the app via the dev server, not file://.
comments.volume_badge_100: Very active discussion: over 100 comments (forum total, schema.org)
comments.green_hint: Visible posts with rating: positive share > 50%
comments.red_hint: Visible posts with rating: positive share ≤ 50%
comments.unrated_hint: Posts without a visible rating bar on this page
comments.max_link_title: Forum post with the most direct replies (current view)
comments.max_replies_standalone_aria: Open forum thread with the most direct replies: {n} replies
comments.login_wall: Forum may require login — open in browser.
comments.rate_limited_hint: Forum data temporarily unavailable (too many requests). Please wait and try again.
comments.forum_mood_happy_title: Clearly more positive ratings (green) than negative (red)
comments.forum_mood_unhappy_title: Clearly more negative ratings (red) than positive (green)
comments.rss_only_note: Golem: comment count and forum link come from the RSS feed; green/red ratings (like Heise) are not available here.
comments.rss_not_in_feed: Article not in the current RSS window (only recent items).
comments.rss_stub_note: This source does not expose comment counts via the feed API — see the article page for discussion.
comments.rss_stub_verge: The Verge: Coral comments load on the article page only; there is no public comment-count API — link jumps to the comments section.
comments.warn_no_discussion_url: heise.de did not provide a forum link in metadata for this article (e.g. some best-of lists). Green/red stats are unavailable.

batch.btn_all_title: Generate AI summaries for all items matching the current filters (uses cache when still valid)
batch.btn_regenerate_title: Regenerate all summaries for current filters (overwrites cache — asks for confirmation)
batch.confirm_regenerate: Regenerate all AI summaries for the current filters? Cached summaries will be overwritten.

news.aria_new: New article since the last update
news.alt_links_refresh: Search again for alternative links (replaces the list)
news.alt_links_err_no_url: No article URL for alternative link search.
news.alt_links_err_no_summary: No summary yet — load or generate one first.
news.alt_links_refresh_none: No alternative links returned (search or URL check).
news.web_search_title: Find the same topic via search engine (new tab)
news.reddit_search_title: Search Reddit for threads on this topic (up to 5)
news.reddit_no_title: No article title for Reddit search.
news.show_all_title: Show all filtered articles at once

filters.magazines_row_label: Heise magazines & Telepolis — enable heise.de sections in Settings, then filter here.

sort.heading: ↕ Sorting
sort.hint: Comment-based sorts load metadata via the dev server (e.g. /api/heise-comments, /api/golem-comments, stubs for ComputerBase/t3n/The Verge) — may take a while.
sort.rate_limit_banner: Comment metadata: rate limit (heise.de). Sorting may be incomplete — click "Apply" again later or reload individual cards.

ki_modal.title_hint: LM Studio 0.4+: Native REST (POST /api/v1/chat) is the default.
ki_modal.hint_rest: REST v1: server root only (no path); the app calls POST …/api/v1/chat.
ki_modal.api_token_placeholder: Only if LM Studio uses Require Authentication
ki_modal.model_hint_default: After a valid server URL is set, available models are loaded. Hover an entry for full metadata (publisher, context, format). Models loaded in LM Studio are marked with a bullet (●).
ki_modal.model_file_sameorigin_error: “REST via same page origin” does not work with file://. Open the app over http(s) (e.g. scripts/dev_server.py) or disable the option and set the LM Studio URL.
ki_modal.summary_cache_hint: IndexedDB in the browser; 0 = unlimited. Regenerate: button on the article card.
ki_modal.summary_privacy_hint: Only the final summary is shown — not internal model reasoning or chain-of-thought.
ki_modal.btn_summarize_all_aria: Generate AI summaries for all items matching the current filters
ki_modal.btn_summarize_all_title: Generates AI summaries for every filtered article (uses cache when still valid)
ki_modal.summary_concurrency_hint: For auto-summarize after refresh and “Summarize all”: how many articles are sent to the AI at once. Higher is faster but loads LM Studio / your API more. Range 1–16, default 4.
ki_modal.ki_request_timeout_hint: Maximum wait per AI call (summaries, batch, YouTube suggestions, etc.). The browser cancels the request after this. Range 15–3600, default 120.
ki_modal.summary_lang_hint: “Website”: match the news site (e.g. German for heise.de, English for The Verge). “Browser”: use the browser UI language (navigator.language) — including languages other than DE/EN.
ki_modal.alternative_links_hint: 0 = off. When enabled, links are loaded via Bing News (RSS) through the local dev server — real article URLs, not invented by the AI. Open the app via scripts/dev_server.py. Use the option below for immediate vs. click-to-reveal display.
ki_modal.alternative_links_display_hint: Choose whether the list appears directly under the AI summary or only after you tap “More sources” on the article card.
ki_modal.alternative_links_blacklist_hint: One domain per line (e.g. example.com). These domains are excluded from alternative links, including subdomains. Full URLs are also accepted.
ki_modal.web_search_engine_hint: Opens a web search for the article title in a new tab (DuckDuckGo, Google, or Bing).
ki_modal.reasoning_enabled_hint: Enable reasoning feature (for LLMs that support this feature).
ki_modal.reasoning_level_hint: Choose the reasoning level for LM Studio models (when supported). Values match the LM Studio API.
ki_modal.theme_section_hint: Adjust light and dark surfaces independently. Apply with Save in the Settings dialog; use the header toggle for a quick light/dark switch. Brightness shifts surface colors toward white or black.
ki_modal.theme_header_hint_light: Top bar (logo row, controls) when the page uses light appearance.
ki_modal.theme_header_hint_dark: Top bar when the page uses dark appearance.

ki_stats.title: AI server — statistics
ki_stats.intro: Successful AI article summaries are recorded locally in the browser. Token counts come from the API: OpenAI-compatible (`usage`) or LM Studio REST (`stats`: input_tokens, total_output_tokens).
ki_stats.chart_caption: X-axis: calendar months (chronological, up to 24). Two bars per month: average tokens per article (entries with token counts only) and total tokens summed in that month. Each series scaled to its own maximum — high total with low average implies many requests; high average implies longer responses. Tooltips show raw numbers.
ki_stats.chart_tokens_none: No token values in these buckets
ki_stats.empty: No data yet — generate AI summaries for articles.
ki_stats.token_na_hint: No token counts in API responses (or no values recorded yet).
